response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify the vocal performances. Two distinct song segments were identified based on on-screen text and audio. For 'BLUE CLAPPER', the search query was '"BLUE CLAPPER" PandaBoy Japanese and English lyrics'. For 'Hyper Jumpin'', the search query was '"Hyper Jumpin'" PandaBoy Japanese and English lyrics'. Lyrics were retrieved from reputable lyric sites and formatted for the final JSON output.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D live performance by hololive 5th generation (known as 'neopolabo': Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, Omaru Polka), consisting of two songs, 'BLUE CLAPPER' and 'Hyper Jumpin''.

scenes.description: The group performs 'BLUE CLAPPER', with the title and composer 'PandaBoy' appearing on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
手を上げて Clap your hands
海の向こうまで Clap your hands
届きますように
手を叩こう 手を叩こう
ほら一緒に everybody
Clap your hands 空の向こうまで
Clap your hands 響きますように
手を叩こう 手を叩こう
光射す僕たちの未来
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Raise your hands, clap your hands
All the way across the sea, clap your hands
May it reach you
Let's clap, let's clap
Come on, everybody, clap your hands together
Clap your hands, all the way across the sky
Clap your hands, may it resonate
Let's clap, let's clap
Our future shining with light

scenes.description: The group performs 'Hyper Jumpin'', with the title and composer 'PandaBoy' appearing on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hyper Jumpin' Now
Hyper Jumpin'
飛び出そう
Come on baby 輝いて
ハートきゅんって Pump it up
Hyper Jumpin' 夢の先まで
もっと もっと 刺激が欲しいの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper Jumpin' Now
Hyper Jumpin'
Let's jump out
Come on baby, shine
Heart goes 'kyun', pump it up
Hyper Jumpin', to the beyond of dreams
More, more, I want more stimulation
